home.title: Indie Game Development.
home.description: I create gameplay systems, visual effects, and tools that bring game ideas to life. Inspired by the games I grew up with, I believe that even simple experiences can become unforgettable when they're built with care, creativity, and attention to detail.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: After many years of learning, experimenting, and overcoming my own doubts, I finally decided to start creating the games I had always imagined.
about.paragraph2: I'm Miguel Ángel, or Cerpion in the indie game development world. I believe that a quiet experience, created with care and dedication, can become something truly unique.
about.paragraph3: It all started when I played Final Fantasy IX as a child. Seeing the love and creativity poured into that game inspired me to create games that can evoke that same sense of wonder and beauty.
about.paragraph4: Today, every project is another step on that journey. I hope you'll join me on this adventure and discover, one project at a time, new memorable experiences.

contact.description: Let's talk about your next project, a collaboration, or simply say hello.
